---
title: "Resources & Downloads"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
---


## 🎓 Recommended Reading & Learning

### Essential Textbooks

**1. Methods for Economic Evaluation of Health Care Programmes**
- Drummond MF, Sculpher MJ, Claxton K, et al. (2015). 4th Edition
- Oxford University Press
- Standard reference for HTA methodology

**2. Introduction to Health Economics**
- Bhattacharya J, Hyde T, Tu P (2014). 2nd Edition
- Comprehensive overview of health economics principles

**3. Health Technology Assessment: A Practical Guide**
- Banta D (2009)
- WHO publication with practical applications

---

## 🔗 Key Indian Resources

### HTAIn (Health Technology Assessment in India) Network

**Main Portal**: [https://htain.dhr.gov.in/index.php](https://htain.dhr.gov.in/index.php)

HTAIn provides comprehensive resources including:
- **Resources Tab** (What We Do section): Methodologies, toolkits, and guidelines
  - HTA methodology documents
  - Cost-effectiveness analysis guidelines
  - Quality of life assessment tools
  - Economic evaluation templates
- HTA research databases
- Training materials
- Policy briefs

**Contact**: Connect through the HTAIn portal for additional resources

---

### Post Graduate Institute of Medical Education & Research (PGIMER)

**Health Economics Course Portal**: [https://www.healtheconomics.pgisph.in](https://www.healtheconomics.pgisph.in)

PGIMER offers:
- Online health economics courses
- Certificate programs in HTA
- Free educational materials
- Video lectures on economic evaluation
- Interactive learning modules
- Regular workshops and webinars

**Highly Recommended** for additional self-paced learning

---

### Regional Resource Centres for HTA (RRC-HTA)

**AIIMS Bhopal - RRC-HTA**
- **Email**: [hta@aiimsbhopal.edu.in](mailto:hta@aiimsbhopal.edu.in)
- Focus: Chronic kidney disease, portable dialysis, renal care
- Conducts HTA workshops and training
- Collaborates on national HTA projects

**Other RRC-HTA Sites**:
- ICMR-NITVAR, Pune (national coordination)
- ICMR-NIRRCH, Mumbai
- AFMC, Pune
- PGIMER, Chandigarh
- KSSSS Cancer Institute, Lucknow

---

## 📹 Video Resources

### Interpretation & Application

**YouTube: CE Plane Interpretation for Policy Makers**
[Watch on YouTube](https://youtu.be/6o9XAqgZH8k?si=hC4WowtRG5O25Zjr)
- Practical guide to understanding quadrants
- Real examples from HTA studies
- Policy decision-making process
- Duration: ~15 minutes

### PGIMER Online Courses
- Health economics fundamentals (YouTube channel)
- Markov modeling tutorials
- Cost-effectiveness analysis practical sessions

---

## 💻 Software & Tools

### Free Statistical Software for HTA

**R Packages** (CRAN)
- `heemod` - Markov models and health economic evaluation
  ```r
  install.packages("heemod")
  ```
- `dampack` - Decision-analytic modeling with PSA
  ```r
  install.packages("dampack")
  ```
- `hesim` - Health economic simulation in R
  ```r
  install.packages("hesim")
  ```
- `BCEA` - Bayesian cost-effectiveness analysis
  ```r
  install.packages("BCEA")
  ```

**Python Libraries**
- `numpy` - Numerical computations
- `pandas` - Data manipulation
- `scipy` - Statistical functions
- `matplotlib` - Visualization

### Online HTA Platforms

**WHO-CHOICE** (Cost-Effectiveness Analysis)
- Website: [https://www.who.int/teams/health-systems-governance-and-financing/economic-analysis/cost-effectiveness-analysis](https://www.who.int/teams/health-systems-governance-and-financing/economic-analysis/cost-effectiveness-analysis)
- Global database of CE analyses
- Methodological guidance

**Tufts Medical Center Cost-Effectiveness Analysis Registry**
- Website: [https://research.tuftsmedicalcenter.org/cear](https://research.tuftsmedicalcenter.org/cear)
- Large repository of CE studies
- Methodological standards

---

## 🌐 International Guidelines & Standards

### ISPOR (International Society For Pharmacoeconomics and Outcomes Research)

**Good Research Practices in HTA**
- Website: [https://www.ispor.org/heor-resources/good-practices](https://www.ispor.org/heor-resources/good-practices)
- Webinars and training materials
- Industry standards and guidelines
- Regional chapters and events

### NICE (National Institute for Health and Care Excellence)

**Appraisal Process & Guidelines**
- Website: [https://www.nice.org.uk/process/pmg9](https://www.nice.org.uk/process/pmg9)
- NICE Guide to the Processes of Technology Appraisal (PMG9)
- Health economic methods guidance
- Case studies and examples

### CHEERS Guidelines

**Consolidated Health Economic Evaluation Reporting Standards (2022)**
- Publication: *Value in Health*, 25(1):3-9
- Standardized reporting for economic evaluations
- Essential for manuscript preparation
- Checklist available at [https://www.equator-network.org/reporting-guidelines/cheers/](https://www.equator-network.org/reporting-guidelines/cheers/)

---

## 📊 Key Research Databases

### PubMed/MEDLINE
- Search terms: "cost-effectiveness analysis", "health technology assessment", "ICER"
- Filter by: India studies, recent publications
- Link: [https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/)

### Google Scholar
- Specialized search for Indian HTA studies
- Citation tracking for influential papers
- Link: [https://scholar.google.com/](https://scholar.google.com/)

### WHO Library Database (WHOLIS)
- WHO publications on health economics
- Link: [https://search.who.int/](https://search.who.int/)

---

## 📚 Recommended Journal Articles

### Foundational Papers on HTA in India

**Health Technology Assessment Context**
1. Prinja S, Gupta M, Verma R, Bahuguna P, Kumar R. (2020). Impact of typhoid conjugate vaccine introduction on health service utilization and costs in India. *BMJ Global Health*, 5(9):e003262.

2. Prinja S, Guleria R, Enns H, et al. (2017). Cost-effectiveness of pneumococcal conjugate vaccination strategies in India. *PLoS ONE*, 12(6):e0180461.

3. Reddy KS, Rao MG, Prabhakar AK. (2016). Health systems strengthening through economic evaluation. *Indian Journal of Public Health*, 60(3):179.

**ICER Interpretation**
4. Husereau D, Drummond M, Petrou S, et al. (2022). Consolidated Health Economic Evaluation Reporting Standards 2022 statement. *Value in Health*, 25(1):3-9.

---

## 🎯 Learning Pathways

### For Beginners
1. Start with PGIMER online course basics
2. Watch the YouTube CE Plane video
3. Use the interactive ICER calculator
4. Complete practice cases in the session

### For Intermediate Users
1. Review NICE PMG9 methodology guide
2. Study HTAIn resources and toolkits
3. Explore international CE registries
4. Read key Indian HTA papers

### For Advanced Users
1. Access HTAIn research databases
2. Study CHEERS reporting standards
3. Engage with RRC-HTA for collaborations
4. Participate in HTAIn network activities

---

## 📧 Institutional Contacts

### Regional Resource Centre for HTA - AIIMS Bhopal
- **Email**: [hta@aiimsbhopal.edu.in](mailto:hta@aiimsbhopal.edu.in)
- **Principal Investigator**: Prof. Dr. Abhijit P. Pakhare
- **Department**: Community and Family Medicine, AIIMS Bhopal


### Workshop Coordination
For questions about this session or future workshops:
- Email: [hta@aiimsbhopal.edu.in](mailto:hta@aiimsbhopal.edu.in)
- Reference: IGGMC Nagpur HTA Workshop, February 24-25, 2026

---

## 🔗 Quick Links Summary

| Resource | Link |
|----------|------|
| **HTAIn Portal** | [https://htain.dhr.gov.in/index.php](https://htain.dhr.gov.in/index.php) |
| **PGIMER Health Economics** | [https://www.healtheconomics.pgisph.in](https://www.healtheconomics.pgisph.in) |
| **YouTube: CE Plane Video** | [https://youtu.be/6o9XAqgZH8k?si=hC4WowtRG5O25Zjr](https://youtu.be/6o9XAqgZH8k?si=hC4WowtRG5O25Zjr) |
| **NICE Methods Guide** | [https://www.nice.org.uk/process/pmg9](https://www.nice.org.uk/process/pmg9) |
| **WHO-CHOICE** | [https://www.who.int/teams/health-systems-governance-and-financing/economic-analysis/cost-effectiveness-analysis](https://www.who.int/teams/health-systems-governance-and-financing/economic-analysis/cost-effectiveness-analysis) |
| **ISPOR** | [https://www.ispor.org/heor-resources/good-practices](https://www.ispor.org/heor-resources/good-practices) |
| **Tufts CEAR** | [https://research.tuftsmedicalcenter.org/cear](https://research.tuftsmedicalcenter.org/cear) |
| **PubMed** | [https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/) |

---

**Last Updated**: February 2026  
**Contact**: [hta@aiimsbhopal.edu.in](mailto:hta@aiimsbhopal.edu.in)
